# AIOS Squads - Source Index

> **Origem:** AIOS (AI Operating System) framework
> **Ingerido:** 2026-03-10
> **Total:** 386 arquivos (300 .md, 76 .yaml, 10 outros)
> **Status:** RAW → Referência ativa

## Squads (12)

### TIER 1 — CRITICAL (Integração Imediata)

| 1 | **hormozi-squad** | 16 | Hormozi completo (Offers, Leads, Pricing, CLOSER, Ads, Content, Hooks, Launch, Retention, Scale, Models, Audit, Copy, Workshop, Advisor) | Enriquece DNA alex-hormozi com frameworks estruturados |
| 2 | **copy-squad** | 23 | Direct response (Halbert, Schwartz, Hopkins, Ogilvy, Brunson, Kennedy, Kern, Settle, Chaperon, etc.) | Nova fonte de DNA: copywriting/persuasão |
| 3 | **brand-squad** | 15 | Brand strategy (Aaker, Keller, Kapferer, Ries, Neumeier, Donald Miller StoryBrand) | Nova fonte de DNA: posicionamento premium |

## Frameworks Chave Extraídos

### De hormozi-squad (TOP PRIORITY)
- **Value Equation:** (Dream Outcome × Perceived Likelihood) / (Time Delay × Effort)
- **CLOSER Framework:** Clarify → Label → Overview → Sell → Explain → Reinforce
- **Core 4 Lead Gen:** Warm Outreach, Cold Outreach, Content, Paid Ads
- **Grand Slam Offer:** 5-step creation methodology
- **6M Diagnostic:** Man, Machine, Material, Method, Measurement, Mother Nature
- **4 Scaling Stages:** Improvise ($0-300K) → Stabilize ($300K-1M) → Systematize ($1M-10M) → Operationalize ($10M+)
- **LTGP Formula:** Gross Profit per Period / Churn Rate
- **Routing Catalog:** 15 domínios → agente especialista (YAML importável)

### De c-level-squad
- **OKR Methodology** (COO)
- **STP Positioning** (CMO)
- **Technology Radar** (CTO)
- **AI Maturity Model** 5 níveis (CAIO)
- **3-Horizon Strategic Planning** (CEO)
- **Enterprise Architecture TOGAF** (CIO)

### De claude-code-mastery
- **17 Hook Events** lifecycle completo
- **Context Budget Economics** para MCP
- **5-Layer Settings Hierarchy**
- **SKILL.md Frontmatter Standard**
- **Subagent Design Patterns** (6 types + custom)
- **Boris Cherny Methodology** (plan-first, verify-don't-trust)
